'''thavusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:old|old]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:old|old]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thavusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thævisith|thævisith]] || [[word:thævisij|thævisij]] || [[word:thævisish|thævisish]] || [[word:thævisi|thævisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavuvusuth|thavuvusuth]] || [[word:thavuvusuj|thavuvusuj]] || [[word:thavuvusush|thavuvusush]] || [[word:thavuvusu|thavuvusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavusuth|thavusuth]] || [[word:thavusuj|thavusuj]] || [[word:thavusush|thavusush]] || [[word:thavusu|thavusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavufsuth|thavufsuth]] || [[word:thavufsuj|thavufsuj]] || [[word:thavufsush|thavufsush]] || [[word:thavufsuf|thavufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thavusuthu|thavusuthu]] || [[word:thavusuju|thavusuju]] || [[word:thavusushu|thavusushu]] || [[word:thavusuku|thavusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thavusuth|thavusuth]] || [[word:thavusuj|thavusuj]] || [[word:thavusush|thavusush]] || [[word:thavusu|thavusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thavusuthul|thavusuthul]] || [[word:thavusujul|thavusujul]] || [[word:thavusushul|thavusushul]] || [[word:thavusukul|thavusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thavusuthuthu|thavusuthuthu]] || [[word:thavusujuju|thavusujuju]] || [[word:thavusushushu|thavusushushu]] || [[word:thavusuku|thavusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thavusuthun|thavusuthun]] || [[word:thavusujun|thavusujun]] || [[word:thavusushun|thavusushun]] || [[word:thavusukun|thavusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thavusuthuoro|thavusuthuoro]] || [[word:thavusujuoro|thavusujuoro]] || [[word:thavusushuoro|thavusushuoro]] || [[word:thavusukuoro|thavusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
